name: Chilled Avocado Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cucumber, peeled, seeded and coarsely chopped
Zest and juice of 1 lime (divided use)
2 tablespoons jalapeno sauce or another smooth green hot sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend buttermilk and avocado pulp in a blender.
2. Add cucumber, onion, lime juice (reserving zest), salt, and pepper.
3. With the blender running, add milk, water, and hot sauce.
4. Chill the soup.
5. Serve garnished with a dollop of sour cream and a sprinkle of lime zest.
Yield: 8 servings
Nutritional information (per serving):
147 calories
10.1 grams fat
2.7 grams saturated fat
10 milligrams cholesterol
128 milligrams sodium
62 percent of calories from fat
